positive.prompt: Write a Node.js Express backend API router with error boundaries
Implement async/await exception handling in our Node.js middleware
How do I optimize CPU-bound tasks in a Node.js service using workers?

negative.prompt: Write a bash script for Linux shell commands
Design a React component UI layout

evals.prompt: Create an Express async request handler that correctly catches and forwards exceptions to middleware.
evals.expected_output: Handler uses proper async/await boundary and forwards errors via next(err).
expectations: Async/await pattern is used with proper try/catch boundaries
Errors are forwarded to the express error handler via next(err)
No unhandled promise rejections are possible in the handler
Consistent JSON error response structures are returned
